scripts.build:ship-bundle: npm run build:frontend-runtime-config && npm run check:python-version && python scripts/build_ship_bundle.py
scripts.build:portable-exe: npm run build:frontend-runtime-config && npm run check:python-version && python scripts/build_portable_exe.py
scripts.verify:portable: npm run check:python-version && python scripts/build_portable_exe.py && python scripts/packaged_desktop_smoke.py && npm run test:frontend
scripts.probe:desktop:startup:cold: npm run check:python-version && python scripts/packaged_desktop_smoke.py --rebuild --startup-probe --profile-only --profile-mode cold --runtime-timeout 60
scripts.probe:desktop:startup:warm: npm run check:python-version && python scripts/packaged_desktop_smoke.py --rebuild --startup-probe --profile-only --profile-mode warm --runtime-timeout 60
